title: Password Hashing, Verification, and Upgrade · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed security review reconstructs password hashing, verification, and upgrade from threat, algorithm, parameter, implementation, key-custody, failure, test-vector, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for versioned password credential verifier after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Store password verifiers with a slow password-hashing construction rather than plaintext, reversible encryption, or fast general hashes.
Select and encode Argon2id memory, time, parallelism, salt, and output parameters from current guidance and measured service budgets.
Choose scrypt or PBKDF2 only from explicit availability and compliance constraints with current calibrated parameters.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Crypto Go Password Upgrade Pepper: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review cryptographic engineering team handles case 7632 during a replicated device restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to admit a versioned password verifier, bound KDF work, and select verify-then-rehash migration; keep browser execution deterministic and move production entropy, native timing, non-allowlisted crypto, network, HSM, and compliance claims to authorized transfer gates; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Perform successful-login rehash, legacy migration, pepper custody and rotation, dummy verification, rate limits, and account recovery without weakening enumeration defenses.

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Password Upgrade Pepper.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Password Upgrade Pepper, keep Crypto Go Password Upgrade Pepper connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Perform successful-login rehash, legacy migration, pepper custody and rotation, dummy verification, rate limits, and account recovery without weakening enumeration defenses.

hints: For Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Password Upgrade Pepper, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Crypto Go Password Upgrade Pepper precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Password Upgrade Pepper, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A review cryptographic engineering team handles case 7632 during a replicated device restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to admit a versioned password verifier, bound KDF work, and select verify-then-rehash migration; keep browser execution deterministic and move production entropy, native timing, non-allowlisted crypto, network, HSM, and compliance claims to authorized transfer gates; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Perform successful-login rehash, legacy migration, pepper custody and rotation, dummy verification, rate limits, and account recovery without weakening enumeration defenses.

For Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Password Upgrade Pepper, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A pepper can be rotated transparently without user passwords or resets.
